MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,990.00 FILED BY JENNINGS, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLATCHY, WILL INDEX FUNDS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT INDEX FUNDS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JENNINGS, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCLATCHY, WILL INDEX FUNDS, INC. $1,160.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,208.00, DEFENDANT MCCLATCHY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT INDEX FUNDS, INC.
